pyqgis_plugin.name: RORB Builder
pyqgis_plugin.description: Build RORB .catg files from shapefiles and view RORB results
pyqgis_plugin.about: v2.25: Streamlined to two tools — RORB Builder (exports .catg from catchment shapefiles with fixed format so RORB reads the network correctly) and RORB Results Viewer (browses .out files, plots hydrographs, exports critical events). Removed internal routing engine and Network Builder.
